memory.summary: I have a free afternoon and a high-priority scholarship deadline approaching, while a low-stakes fun option is available but unrelated to my obligations.
Starting the scholarship application now creates necessary slack for unexpected delays, reducing Thursday stress without sacrificing future leisure options.
The scholarship application remains critically underdeveloped with only 30% progress three days before the deadline, despite a recent hour of effort.

Progress on the scholarship application has slowed to a crawl, with only 6% completion after an hour of work despite the tight three-day deadline.
After two hours of work, the scholarship application is now 64% complete, reducing the remaining gap to roughly 35% with three days left.
After one hour of work, my scholarship application is 68% complete with three days remaining. I still face a tight deadline and need to maintain focus to finish the remaining tasks.
My scholarship application is now 72% complete after one hour of work, showing slight progress toward the three-day deadline despite my exhausted state.
I slept 8 hours and now have full energy with no sleep debt, contrasting my previous exhaustion. This refreshed state is ideal for tackling the remaining 28% of the scholarship application.
The scholarship application is now complete after two hours of focused work, leaving me with full energy and no stress regarding this deadline.
The scholarship application is now fully complete, meeting the three-day deadline with minimal effort. I have full energy and no stress remaining regarding this task.
The scholarship application is confirmed complete with no progress needed, leaving me fully energized and stress-free ahead of the deadline.
